$description: Uniclass 2015 classification floor for the Building Design System. Published by NBS UK; the openBIM-recognised default. Eleven primary tables; project-bim treats this as the classification floor analogous to project-design's Carbon-baseline-floor pattern.

version.$description: Version pin. Re-pin annually after NBS releases the next minor revision.

license.$value: Free for use; NBS terms apply
license.$description: Uniclass tables are downloadable for use without licence fees per NBS public terms; verify per release.

$value.name: Complexes
$value.scope: Site-scale developments and groups of projects

$value.name: Elements / Functions
$value.scope: Major building parts by function (walls, roofs, structural frame, finishes)

$value.name: Project management activities
$value.scope: Activities, processes, services around project delivery
$value.description: service-materials maps materials onto Pm where applicable; Ma is the more common material classification target

$value.name: Forms of information
$value.scope: Information container types (drawings, models, specifications, schedules)

$value.name: Spaces / Locations
$value.scope: Functional spaces (office, kitchen, toilet, plant room)

$value.name: Project costs
$value.scope: Cost classification for estimating and forecasting

$value.name: Project elements
$value.scope: Project-level elements not yet classified at component level
